name: Samudera Shipping Line Ltd
summary: Samudera Shipping Line Ltd, a container shipping company, transports cargo to various ports in Southeast Asia, the Indian Sub-continent, the Far East, and the Middle East. The company operates in three segments: Container Shipping, Bulk and Tanker, and Logistics and Others. It provides feeder services between its hub port in Singapore and other spoke ports in Asia to main line operators; liner services to traders and freight forwarders; and inter-regional container shipping services to manufacturers, exporters, and importers. The company also offers regional industrial shipping services for liquid and gas, and dry bulk cargoes; marine offshore support services; and tramp shipping agency services, including customs clearance, cargo and crew handling, and ship husbandry. In addition, it provides freight forwarding, transportation, and logistics services, such as logistics management, breakbulk, document processing, warehousing facilities, point to point deliveries, packing and crating, air cargo, project cargo management, FCL/LCL consolidations, customs clearance, transportation/transloading, door to door, valuable/dangerous cargo handling, and supply chain facilities. Further, the company offers shipping agency and container freight station services; owns office properties; and owns and charters vessels. It operates a fleet of 27 vessels, including 24 container vessels, 2 chemical tankers, and 1 gas tanker. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Singapore. Samudera Shipping Line Ltd is a subsidiary of PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk.
